---
title: "Switching to blogdown"
date: 2017-04-30
categories: [news]
tags: [R, blogging]
description: "Testing the new blogdown setup for R-based blogging"
---

I've finally got a new blog post, to test that my new set-up is working, using the wonderful [blogdown](https://bookdown.org/yihui/blogdown/) package.

This allows R code to be embedded directly in blog posts, making it perfect for data science and research blogging.

The transition from oldWordPress to blogdown was smooth and I haven't looked back since!
